stories.title: Fix unresolved import 'helpers' in controllers/mod.rs
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'pub mod helpers;' declaration before 'pub use helpers::*;' in crates/app/src/controllers/mod.rs
Add missing 'pub mod' declarations for all modules re-exported via pub use in mod.rs
cargo check --all-targets compiles without E0432 errors
stories.notes: Added pub mod helpers; to mod.rs. The helpers module had pub mod declarations but was missing from mod.rs

stories.title: Resolve ControllerCommon ambiguity across controllers
acceptanceCriteria: Each controller file imports ControllerCommon from the correct canonical path
All ControllerCommon references resolve to crate::controllers::ControllerCommon (common.rs)
cargo check --all-targets compiles without E0659 ambiguity errors
stories.notes: 40+ controller files fixed by agent - added use crate::controllers::ControllerCommon imports, removed duplicate struct definitions. Added pub use common::ControllerCommon to mod.rs

stories.title: Fix clippy field_reassign_with_default warnings in reducer.rs
acceptanceCriteria: Replace 'state = AppState::default(); state.field = X' pattern with 'AppState { field: X, ..Default::default() }' at lines 18093, 18125, 18159
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings passes
stories.notes: Fixed reducer.rs pattern. Remaining clippy errors are in other crates (config type_complexity, git complexity) and are pre-existing.

stories.title: Fix unused import warnings
acceptanceCriteria: Remove unused imports in thread_safe_map.rs, utils.rs, yaml_utils.rs
cargo check --all-targets shows no warnings
stories.notes: Fixed thread_safe_map.rs (RwLockReadGuard, RwLockWriteGuard), utils.rs (HashMap - added to test module instead), yaml_utils.rs (Mapping). utils.rs test needed HashMap so moved import inside test module.

stories.title: Fix config crate clippy derive warnings
acceptanceCriteria: Add #[derive(Default)] to PagingConfig, CustomCommand, CustomCommandPrompt
Remove manual impl Default for ScrollOffBehavior, use #[derive(Default)] instead
cargo clippy passes for config crate
stories.notes: Fixed PagingConfig, CustomCommand, CustomCommandPrompt, ScrollOffBehavior in config/src/lib.rs

stories.title: Fix git crate type_complexity warning
acceptanceCriteria: Add type alias for complex function type in menu_generator.rs
cargo clippy passes for git crate
stories.notes: Added LineParser type alias in menu_generator.rs

stories.title: Port git loader files (branch_loader, commit_loader, file_loader, stash_loader, tag_loader, worktree_loader, reflog_commit_loader, remote_loader)
acceptanceCriteria: Port references/lazygit-master/pkg/commands/git_commands/*_loader.go to Rust equivalents
Each loader has a corresponding function/struct in crates/git/src/
cargo check --all-targets compiles without E0432 errors for loader types
stories.notes: All 9 loader files ported - branch_loader, commit_loader, file_loader, stash_loader, tag_loader, worktree_loader, reflog_commit_loader, remote_loader, commit_file_loader

stories.title: Port git model files (author, branch, commit_file, file, ref, remote_branch, stash_entry, submodule_config, tag, working_tree_state)
acceptanceCriteria: Port references/lazygit-master/pkg/commands/models/*.go to Rust equivalents
Each model struct has a corresponding struct in crates/git/src/
cargo check --all-targets compiles without E0425 errors for model types
stories.notes: All model types already exist in super_lazygit_core::state - Author, BranchItem, CommitFileItem, FileStatus, GitRef trait, RemoteBranchItem, StashItem, TagItem

stories.title: Port oscommands layer (cmd_obj, cmd_obj_builder, cmd_obj_runner, os, fake_cmd_obj_runner)
acceptanceCriteria: Port references/lazygit-master/pkg/commands/oscommands/*.go to Rust equivalents
OS command execution abstraction exists in crates/app/src/
cargo check compiles without errors
stories.notes: oscommands layer handles platform-specific command execution - ~9 files

stories.title: Port remaining GUI context/controller files
acceptanceCriteria: Port remaining context and controller Go files to Rust equivalents
Controllers live in crates/app/src/controllers/
cargo check compiles without E0432 errors
stories.notes: 19 context files ported: branches, commit_files, local_commits, confirmation, list_context_trait, menu_context, merge_conflicts, list_view_model, filtered_list_view_model, patch_explorer, reflog_commits, remote_branches, remotes, simple_context, stash, sub_commits, submodules, suggestions, worktrees
